word: G2086 - ἑτεροζυγέω - heterozygéō - het-er-od-zoog-eh'-o - Unequally yoke together with

sections.paragraph:
ἑτεροζυγέω - heterozugeō - het-er-od-zoog-eh'-o

From a compound of G2087 and G2218; to yoke up differently, that is, (figuratively) to associate discordantly: - unequally yoke together with.
